industrial.title: SafeGAI Smart Safety Platform
industrial.heroDesc: SafeGAI is a next-generation smart safety platform that revolutionizes industrial safety based on NVIDIA Jetson RTX edge AI and Amazon AWS cloud infrastructure. By integrating multimodal AI video analytics, IoT sensor fusion, and digital twin technology, it delivers real-time hazard detection, predictive accident prevention, and automated monitoring across industrial, construction, and public safety domains.
industrial.archEdge: Real-time video analytics on NVIDIA Jetson RTX with DeepStream + TensorRT, sensor fusion, and immediate alarm processing
industrial.archComm: Event metadata transmission via MQTT/AWS IoT Core, local buffering and automatic retransmission during network failures
industrial.archCloud: AWS SageMaker AI retraining, DynamoDB event storage, API Gateway + Lambda serverless monitoring API
industrial.archControl: Web/mobile dashboard, digital twin 3D visualization, multi-facility integrated monitoring

techStack.title: NVIDIA Jetson RTX Edge AI
techStack.subtitle: Edge AI Computing
techStack.desc: High-performance edge computing based on NVIDIA Jetson Orin for real-time AI inference on-site. DeepStream SDK multi-channel video analysis with TensorRT-optimized millisecond-level hazard detection.

techStack.title: Amazon AWS Cloud
techStack.subtitle: Cloud Infrastructure
techStack.desc: Infinitely scalable serverless architecture based on AWS IoT Core, SageMaker, Lambda, and DynamoDB. Edge event data cloud analysis and continuous AI model retraining.

techStack.title: Multimodal Sensor Fusion
techStack.subtitle: Multimodal Sensor Fusion
techStack.desc: Time-synchronized integrated analysis of IP cameras, smart bands, environmental sensors, fire detectors, and radar. Complex situational awareness and precise risk assessment.

techStack.title: Digital Twin Monitoring
techStack.subtitle: Digital Twin Control
techStack.desc: Physical spaces rendered as 3D digital twins with real-time sensor data and AI analysis results intuitively visualized. Multi-facility integrated monitoring support.

domains.title: Industrial Safety
domains.subtitle: Manufacturing Safety
items: Real-time detection of falls, collapses, and prolonged immobility
Automatic restricted zone intrusion alerts with equipment interlocking
Hazardous gas, high temperature, and noise environmental monitoring
Per-worker smart band health anomaly detection
AI-based hazardous behavior pattern analysis and predictive alerts

domains.title: Construction Safety

Automatic detection of missing safety helmets and vests
Automatic alerts for personnel within crane and excavator operating radius
Vibration sensor-linked collapse risk monitoring
Automated daily safety reports and manager notifications

Abnormal behavior detection at bus shelters and public parks
Early warning for fires, smoke, and flooding disasters
Crowd density analysis and safety management for public facilities
Smart CCTV-linked crime prevention and emergency response

elderly.title: Elderly & Disability Smart Safety Platform
elderly.heroTitle:
AI-Based Non-Contact Monitoring,
Personalized Smart Care
elderly.heroDesc: A non-contact AI monitoring system that protects the safety of elderly and disabled individuals 24/7 through fall detection, abnormal behavior recognition, smart band integration, and environmental sensor fusion. This next-generation smart safety platform detects hazardous situations early without privacy intrusion and enhances quality of life through personalized care.

techStack.title: Non-Contact Radar/AI Detection
techStack.subtitle: Non-contact Radar & AI
techStack.desc: Utilizing AI radar and video analysis technology without CCTV to detect falls, abnormal behavior, and wandering in real-time without privacy intrusion. Safe monitoring even in private spaces such as bedrooms and bathrooms.

techStack.title: Smart Band Integration
techStack.subtitle: Smart Band Integration
techStack.desc: Real-time collection of biometric data including heart rate, temperature, activity levels, and sleep patterns through smart bands. Early detection of health anomalies and wandering detection through location tracking.

techStack.title: Environmental Sensor Fusion
techStack.subtitle: Environment Sensor Fusion
techStack.desc: Comprehensive analysis of indoor environmental data including temperature/humidity, air quality, illumination, and noise. Automatic maintenance of comfortable living environments with immediate detection of fire and gas leaks.

techStack.title: 3-Step Alert System
techStack.subtitle: 3-Step Alert System
techStack.desc: Automatic 3-step escalation upon hazard detection: voice guidance, strong warning sounds, and guardian/authority notifications. Customized response based on situation severity to secure the golden time.

domains.subtitle: Senior Community Center

Immediate fall and consciousness loss detection alerts
Early detection of abnormal behavior during programs
Automatic access management and headcount tracking
Integrated monitoring dashboard for administrators

integrated.title: Smart Integrated Control Platform
integrated.heroDesc: A next-generation integrated control platform that remotely manages video, audio, lighting, HVAC, and ventilation through a single smart interface. Maximizing space efficiency and reducing operational costs through multimodal sensor-based context-aware automation and remote management.

techStack.title: Integrated Controller (XCN-3000)
techStack.subtitle: Integrated Controller
techStack.desc: The Advanced Integrated Controller XCN-3000 supports multiple protocols including RS232/485, TCP/IP, IR, and relay to provide unified control of video, audio, lighting, and environmental equipment through a single interface.

techStack.title: Remote Management (ThingsEye)
techStack.subtitle: Remote Management
techStack.desc: ThingsEye solution enables remote monitoring and control of multi-space facility status. Supports automated operations through real-time data collection, analysis, and scheduling.

techStack.title: Context-Aware Automation
techStack.subtitle: Context-Aware Automation
techStack.desc: Leveraging multimodal sensor data from air quality, motion, and cameras to recognize spatial contexts and automatically optimize equipment control. Maximizes energy savings and space efficiency.

techStack.title: Video Conference Integration
techStack.subtitle: Video Conference Integration
techStack.desc: Automatically configures optimal meeting and presentation environments through speaker tracking systems, video conferencing integration, echo cancellation, and camera preset-based position tracking.

safety.title: Smart Safety
safety.heroDesc: A next-generation industrial safety solution integrating AI cameras, smart bands, environmental sensors, and fire detection systems. Protecting workers' lives and safety through Edge AI-based real-time hazard detection and automatic alarms. Operating independently on-site even during network failures to ensure safety in any situation.

monitoring.title: Control System
monitoring.heroDesc: An integrated monitoring system that tracks temperature, humidity, gas concentration, dust, and noise in real-time through multi-environmental sensors and IoT gateways. Preemptively blocking risks through AI-based anomaly detection and predictive analysis, maximizing operational efficiency through data-driven decision making.

control.title: Integrated Control
control.heroDesc: A next-generation integrated control system managing video, audio, lighting, HVAC, and ventilation through the XCN-3000 integrated controller and ThingsEye remote management platform. Maximizing space efficiency and reducing operational costs through multimodal sensor-based context-aware automation and cloud remote management.

about.title: About Us
about.ceoIntro: ThingsWell is growing as an on-device AI spatial computing company leading innovation in industrial and daily-life safety, backed by extensive R&D achievements and product commercialization experience. What we pursue is not just technology, but safety solutions that protect lives and build trust even in the most extreme environments. We will continue to realize valuable innovations that our customers and society need through relentless research and challenge.
about.missionDesc: Providing innovative solutions using AI technology so that everyone can live in a safe and convenient environment.
about.visionDesc: As a leader in multimodal situational awareness technology, we aim to become a global leader in safety and automation.

coreValues.title: Challenge (Innovation)
coreValues.desc: Securing competitiveness through future-oriented R&D investment and core technology internalization

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.desc: Providing one-stop solutions based on AI, embedded SW, and ICT construction capabilities

coreValues.title: Social Responsibility (Social Impact)
coreValues.desc: Contributing to public interest by improving safety and welfare for the elderly, disabled, and industrial workers

about.orgHeroTitle:
Efficient Organization
Powered by AI Agents
about.orgHeroDesc: ThingsWell operates an efficient organizational structure with AI agent-based smart workflows, enabling large-scale project execution even with a small team. Each team maximizes productivity across development, sales, manufacturing, and research by leveraging AI tools.
